overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a nighttime walk around an art deco municipal building during a thunderstorm. The camera circles the building, passes through a covered courtyard with green neon lighting, and exits to a rain-soaked city street with lightning illuminating the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city street alongside art deco municipal building

events.description: approaching intersection with red traffic light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-soaked street beside the illuminated municipal building

entered.detail: large stone building with vertical windows and art deco architectural details
tall palm tree in street-side planter
rain-soaked road surface reflecting street lights and building illumination
ornate black street lamp post with glowing light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a virtual city, walking alongside a grand art deco municipal building with illuminated windows. The wet asphalt reflects the street lamps and building lights as the camera approaches an intersection with a red traffic light visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with view of downtown skyline

events.description: turns left at the street corner toward the building entrance
lightning flash illuminates the night sky above the city

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and approaching the building entrance

entered.detail: distant illuminated skyscrapers visible against the dark sky
low-rise buildings with lit windows lining the street

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at the intersection, revealing an open view of the downtown skyline. A lightning flash briefly illuminates the sky as the camera approaches the main entrance of the municipal building, which now stands directly ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered art deco courtyard with green neon lighting

events.description: enters the covered courtyard area of the municipal building
camera tilts upward to view the architectural details overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered courtyard with art deco columns and green lighting

entered.detail: tall stone columns with decorative capitals lining the walkway
art deco wall sconces emitting distinctive teal-green light
walls with blue mosaic tile accents and geometric patterns
ornate ceiling with recessed lighting and architectural details

segments.scene_description: Entering the sheltered courtyard, the scene shifts to an enclosed space with distinctive art deco architecture. Tall columns with green neon sconces line the walkway, and the camera briefly tilts up to admire the ornate ceiling before continuing toward the grand staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance with stairs and archway

events.description: ascends the wide stairs toward the main entrance
passes through the archway exiting to the opposite street

agents.ego_description: walking up the stairs and passing through the main entrance archway

entered.detail: wide stone stairs with decorative tile risers leading to entrance
tall decorative arch with glass doors and ornate framing
view of the street and city lights visible through the exit

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the grand staircase toward the main entrance, passing through the imposing archway. The art deco details of the doorway frame the view of the city street beyond, transitioning from the sheltered interior back toward the exposed street.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with view of downtown skyline

events.description: exits the building to the street on the opposite side
lightning strike visible in the distance over the city

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk with view of the city skyline and distant lightning

entered.detail: wet city street with traffic lights and crosswalks
tall illuminated buildings with purple and white lights
multi-story building with grid of lit windows

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the building, the camera emerges onto a rain-soaked sidewalk with an open view of the downtown skyline. A dramatic lightning strike flashes across the sky above the distant skyscrapers as the walk continues along the quiet city street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked city street, through the sheltered neon interior of a municipal building, and back out into a stormy urban landscape. It begins by walking alongside a grand art deco building where wet asphalt reflects the glow of street lamps, moving toward an intersection just as a flash of lightning illuminates the distant downtown skyline. As the camera turns and enters the building, the scene shifts into a sheltered courtyard characterized by tall columns and green neon sconces, with a brief upward tilt toward the ornate ceiling. The movement then carries the camera up a grand staircase and through an imposing archway, transitioning from the architectural enclosure back toward the open air. Finally, the camera emerges onto a rain-soaked sidewalk, where another dramatic lightning strike flashes across the sky above the skyscrapers as the walk continues along the quiet street.
